_meta.purpose: Pre-computed cultural anchors per year, used by record-type generators in src/voice/generator.py to ground 'last time it was this hot in YEAR' framings without asking Gemini to invent one.
_meta.selection_criteria: Globally legible (the bot covers 179 countries — anchors must read outside the US). Universally recognizable as time-markers. POLITICALLY NEUTRAL — no elections, wars, terrorism, political movements, or divisive public figures. NO mass-tragedy-as-scaffolding (no using deaths or disasters as time-markers). Tech, film, music, sports (when global), space/science, weird-global-events are the safe lanes.
_meta.format: year (string) -> list of short anchor strings, each ready to slot into 'back when X' / 'the year Y' / 'still when Z' framings.
_meta.year_coverage: 1995-2025. Open-Meteo archive starts ~1995; pre-1995 records are exceedingly rare in this pipeline.
_meta.tuning_note: Era anchors are ONE framing tool, not the default for every record. Other moves (past-tense personification, accelerating warming, place-as-punchline, absolute scale) often beat them. Curate for variety; don't expand the set just to fill years.
_meta.audit_history: 2026-04-26 — pruned 26 politically-charged or US-centric entries flagged in the 2026-04-27 corpus grading. Review each new addition against the selection_criteria above.

Mac and PC were still actually fighting
